description: A screenshot of an email styled like an email-client view. A bold header reads 'TERRIFIED MASKED ICE AGENTS'. The From and To fields and parts of the addresses are blacked out, with a Sent line dated 'June 6, 2025 8:02:28 AM UTC'. The body is a long block of capitalized text containing violent threats against ICE agents, with profanity. The message closes with 'Sincerely,' and a name line.
notable_text: TERRIFIED MASKED ICE AGENTS; Sent: June 6, 2025 8:02:28 AM UTC
